languages.text: "Наша некогда святая планета стала рассадником зла — мы были беспечны и не заметили, как глубоко укоренилась ересь Алой длани в сердцах верных слуг Его, ослепив им глаза и сердца".

traits.locale_text: "Наша некогда святая планета стала рассадником зла — мы были беспечны и не заметили, как глубоко укоренилась ересь Алой длани в сердцах верных слуг Его, ослепив им глаза и сердца".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."
languages.original_text: "Наша некогда святая планета стала рассадником зла — мы были беспечны и не заметили, как глубоко укоренилась ересь Алой длани в сердцах верных слуг Его, ослепив им глаза и сердца".

traits.locale_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Unser einst heiliger Planet wurde zu einer Brutstätte des Bösen — wir waren unvorsichtig und konnten nicht sehen, wie tief die Ketzerei der Roten Hand in den Herzen seiner treuen Diener Wurzeln schlug, ihre Augen blendete und ihre Herzen verdarb."
languages.original_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."

languages.text: "Notre planète autrefois sacrée est devenue un terrain propice au mal — nous avons été négligents et n'avons pas su voir à quel point l'hérésie de la Main Pourpre s'est enracinée dans les cœurs de ses loyaux serviteurs, aveuglant leurs yeux et corrompant leurs cœurs."
languages.original_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."

languages.text: "我们曾经神圣的星球变成了邪恶的温床--我们粗心大意，没有看到绯红之手的异端邪说是如何深深地扎根于他忠诚的仆人们的心中，蒙蔽了他们的双眼，腐蚀了他们的心灵。"
languages.original_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."

languages.text: "Nuestro planeta, antaño sagrado, se convirtió en un caldo de cultivo para el mal: fuimos descuidados y no pudimos ver hasta qué punto la herejía de la Mano Carmesí echó raíces en el calor de sus leales siervos, cegando sus ojos y corrompiendo sus corazones".
languages.original_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."

languages.text: 「かつては聖なる星であった私たちの星が、悪の温床となった。私たちは不注意で、クリムゾン・ハンドの異端がいかに深く主の忠実なしもべたちの熱に根を下ろし、彼らの目を曇らせ、心を堕落させるかを見ることができなかった。
languages.original_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."

languages.text: "Bir zamanlar kutsal olan gezegenimiz kötülüğün üreme alanı haline geldi — dikkatsiz davrandık ve Kızıl Elma sapkınlığının O'nun sadık hizmetkârlarının kalplerinde ne kadar derin kök saldığını, gözlerini kör ettiğini ve kalplerini bozduğunu göremedik."
languages.original_text: "Our once holy planet became a breeding ground for evil — we were careless and could not see how deeply the Crimson Hand heresy took root in the heats of His loyal servants, blinding their eyes and corrupting hearts."
